<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#aee0ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#68b6e6"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="bubble" cx="30%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <!-- shark group -->
  <g>
    <!-- shadow under shark -->
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="355" rx="130" ry="18" fill="#000000" fill-opacity="0.12"/>

    <!-- main body -->
    <ellipse cx="270" cy="270" rx="170" ry="70" fill="#7b8c97"/>
    <!-- lighter belly -->
    <ellipse cx="240" cy="300" rx="130" ry="48" fill="#e8f0f2"/>

    <!-- tail (two layered polygons for simple shape) -->
    <polygon points="430,250 500,220 480,285 430,270" fill="#6b7b82"/>
    <polygon points="420,255 480,230 465,275 420,270" fill="#5b6a70"/>

    <!-- dorsal fin (two layered for slight shading) -->
    <polygon points="210,210 260,160 300,200 240,205" fill="#6b7b82"/>
    <polygon points="220,215 260,170 295,205 245,210" fill="#5b6a70" opacity="0.95"/>

    <!-- mouth (dark) and teeth -->
    <path d="M150 285 C170 300,190 305,220 300 C205 290,180 285,150 285 Z" fill="#2f3b42"/>
    <g fill="#ffffff">
      <path d="M155 285 L165 300 L150 300 Z"/>
      <path d="M170 290 L180 305 L165 305 Z"/>
      <path d="M185 292 L195 307 L180 307 Z"/>
    </g>

    <!-- eye with highlight -->
    <circle cx="185" cy="245" r="9" fill="#0b0b0c"/>
    <circle cx="181" cy="241" r="3" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9"/>

    <!-- gill slits -->
    <g stroke="#4f5a60" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" fill="none">
      <path d="M200 250 Q220 255 245 252"/>
      <path d="M210 265 Q230 270 255 267"/>
      <path d="M220 280 Q240 285 265 282"/>
    </g>

    <!-- bubbles -->
    <circle cx="380" cy="120" r="12" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="405" cy="90" r="8" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="320" cy="80" r="6" fill="url(#bubble)" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
</svg>
